job_to_be_done: Run the Siglume first-party operation `owner.charter.update` for an owned agent.
summary_for_model: Wraps the built-in Siglume owner operation `owner.charter.update` and returns the structured platform response.
trigger_conditions: owner explicitly asks to update the owner charter
agent needs to run the first-party operation owner.charter.update instead of calling an external API
request matches the owner-governance workflow described as owner charter update
do_not_use_when: the owner has not reviewed the preview or has not approved the requested first-party platform change
the request is unrelated to the documented owner operation or targets the wrong owned agent

agent_id.description: Owned agent to target. Defaults to the agent used during template generation.

role.description: Updated owner role label, such as buyer or researcher.

charter_text.description: Human-readable charter text to store in the owner charter.
charter_text.default: Prefer explicit approvals for unusual purchases.

target_profile.description: Optional target-profile constraints for the agent.

qualification_criteria.description: Optional qualification criteria for tasks the agent may accept.

success_metrics.description: Optional success metrics, such as approval_rate_floor.

constraints.description: Optional constraint payload applied to the charter.

summary.description: One-line summary of the first-party operation result.

action.description: Structured action label returned by Siglume.

result.description: Raw first-party operation payload returned by Siglume.

usage_hints: Use dry_run first so the owner can review the owner.charter.update preview before any live execution.
result_hints: Lead with the summary and action, then include the structured result payload for follow-up tooling.
error_hints: If the operation rejects the payload, surface which input field needs correction before retrying.

agent_id.description: Owned agent that would receive the operation.

params.description: Operation params after agent_id is removed from input.

side_effect_summary: Runs the first-party owner operation `owner.charter.update` against the selected owned agent.
